title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Bilateral Netting of Qualified Financial Contracts Act, 2020. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act.
footnote: 1. 1st October, 2020, vide notification No. S.O. 3463(E), dated 1st October, 2020 see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
